snippet.title: CG5 × Pomni - Lover Without A Heart [Ode to CAINE] (The Amazing Digital Circus Song Animation)
snippet.description:
STREAM NOW: https://cg5.lnk.to/loverwithoutaheart

Song by @CG5
Vocals by @CG5 & @LizzieRFreeman
Visuals by @CodaAnim

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461, & @cg5covers107
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS: 

Poor poor ringleader,
With the porcelain grin.
Controls a circus,
But he can’t control the kin.

So the spotlight flickers,
And the illusion breaks apart.
But this universe was broken from the start.
In the center of the ring, he says:

“I can fix this, Bubble, it’s like a puzzle.
A problem I need to solve.
I’ll pick up my mess, don’t you move a muscle,
It will be resolved.
Please, please, don’t leave me,
I’ll make life easy,
It’s like you’ll be at home.
Mi casa, su casa,
So don’t leave me alone.
Please?"

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

Running through this server storm, 
Gotta grit your teeth while the master performs his show.
Taken through hell and back,
Disguised as a digital, colorful, delightful dome.
Gli-gli-glitches getting quicker,
Cuz tooth-face got no tick-tick-ticker.
Why does this computer need friends?
In the center of the ring, he says…

“I can put it all together, I can make it all whatever
I want, so why don’t you care?
Can’t you just play along,
Nothing ever goes wrong.
Anything can be repaired.
Please, please, don’t leave me,
I’ll make life easy,
It’s like you’ll be at home.
Mi casa, su casa,
So don’t leave me alone."

Don’t leave me,
Don’t leave me alone.
I said, don’t leave me.
This show must go on.
Listen, don’t leave me,
Don’t leave me alone.
I said, don’t leave me.
Let’s get this show on the road.

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

So, the first trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day just released. And it looks really exciting. Thw suit is absolutely gorgeous, I love referencing different iconic comic covers. And I really dig the darker tone that they’re going for with Tom Holland in comparison to the brighter and more fun “Home Trilogy.” Director Destin Daniel Cretton has really impressed me with his other work in the MCU like Shang Chi and Wonder Man, and from the looks of things it seems like he truly understands Spider-Man and what makes him so special.

     I’m gonna try not to get my hopes up too much though. You know how trailers go, if you get too excited you’re inevitably gonna set yourself up for disappoint—

Oh my god Scorpion is back? And Keith David is in it?

Ok yeah this is gonna be a 10 out of 10.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Припев

В живота има бедни и богати 
Има много шматки има и тарикати 
Знам добре пораснах в крайните квартали 
Помня ясно за какво сме си мечтали 

Куплет 1

Не ми обяснявай за кеш изкарал съм го с много труд и под 
И всяко едно постижение струва ми скъпо в тоя живот 
Гледаш червено ферари пред вкъщи и казваш - мафиот 
Абе ей идиот живота ми не е на автопилот 

Тръгнах от нулата знам че боли да избухнеш и да си добре
Ако ада има 9 кръга аз ги преминах брат и деветте 
Недей да ме мразиш че купил съм на жена си чисто ново Порше 
Но жена ми като нямах нищо във мене повярва и в мен се закле 

Сутринта излизам с АМГ 63
На обяд съм със Континентал Бентли 
Вечерта със компетишъна ми М3
Отгоре до долу облечен съм във фенди

Втори куплет:

Много мизерия много уроци научих за мойте години 
За имоти, пари и коли, прескачат се даже и кръвни роднини 
Живота направи ме вълк но аз не желая да съм като тях 
Защото нямах нищо и нищо на никой не съм взел на тоя свят 

Вървя през тунелите тъмни нагоре катерех и планините 
Нито веднъж на приятелите ми не съм им заглеждал жените 
Искам едно да ти кажа и чуй го внимателно и запомни го
1+1 е равно на 2 но ти избра ножа и във гърба ми заби го 

Предателите нямат място на масата 
Нямат място и до мен в S класата
Хейтъра си го изяжда омразата 
Не ме сравнявай с тях, че тук я няма базата

snippet.title: ONE SPOON OF CHOCOLATE Official Trailer (2026) Quentin Tarantino Presents, RZA
snippet.description:
Only in theaters May 1, 2026

RZA’S ONE SPOON OF CHOCOLATE follows Unique (Shameik Moore, “Dope” and voice of Miles Morales in the Spider-Verse films), a veteran and ex-convict seeking a fresh start in a small town. After an altercation with a gang of locals, he starts to suspect they may have something to do with the disappearance of young men in the area - including his cousin. 

As he digs for the truth, he finds himself the target of not only the gang, but the local sheriff’s office, whose involvement in the disappearances may be even more sinister. Instead of waiting for his turn to be picked off, Unique and those closest to him (Paris Jackson, RJ Cyler) decide to fight back in this sharply satirical and stylish action thriller from the visionary leader of the Wu-Tang Clan.

snippet.title: Keep It Chavy !
snippet.description:
Straight out the Yorkshire council estates, KEEP IT CHAVY is a raw, unapologetic anthem from MC INNES & RD WESTYORKS. 🇬🇧🔥
This track celebrates the real side of estate life — tracksuits, late-night link-ups, corner shop runs and the pride of growing up where loyalty and graft mean everything.

With gritty bars, northern attitude and a beat that hits hard, KEEP IT CHAVY reps the culture that raised us. No pretending, no switching up — just proper Yorkshire energy and council estate spirit.
